name: Precious Persimmon Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease muffin tins.
3. In a small bowl, mix pureed persimmons with baking soda and set aside.
4. Cream margarine and sugar in a large bowl until smooth.
5. Add eggs and beat well.
6. Gradually add flour, salt, and cinnamon; beat until just combined.
7. Stir in vanilla extract, lemon juice, and bourbon (if using).
8. Fold in nuts and currants (if using) until evenly distributed.
9. Fill each muffin cup about 3/4 full.
10. Bake for 45 minutes.
11. Remove from muffin pans and let cool before serving.
